data.title: Analyst: Bitcoin Is Repeating the Pattern Behind S&P’s 200% Rally
data.description:
Analyst compares BTC’s “flat correction” and deep drawdown to the S&P’s 61% crash before its explosive bull run.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/analyst-bitcoin-is-repeating-the-pattern-behind-sps-200-rally/

data.title: The combined U.S. nonfarm payrolls figure for July and August was revised down by 33,000.
data.description: The U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics reported that July's nonfarm payrolls were revised down by 7,000 to 72,000 from +79,000; August's nonfarm payrolls were revised down by 26,000 to -4,000 from +22,000. After revisions, the combined job gains for July and August were 33,000 lower than the initial revisions. (Jinshi)

data.title: The interest rate market is still pricing in a Fed rate cut in December.
data.description: The interest rate swap market continues to indicate that a December rate cut by the Federal Reserve is unlikely. Following the release of the latest economic data, traders increased their bets on a Fed rate cut, but still expect the Fed to skip December. (Jinshi)

data.title: AVAX One, a treasury company, launches a $40 million stock buyback program.
data.description: AVAX One, a Nasdaq-listed treasury company, announced that its board of directors has approved a $40 million share repurchase program. The program will run for one year and may be conducted from time to time through public market transactions or other means permitted by applicable securities laws and regulations. The timing and amount of the repurchases will depend on market conditions, regulatory requirements, capital allocation plans, and other company factors. (Prnewswire)

data.title: JPMorgan Chase: Market concerns that MSCI may remove Strategy from key stock indices.
data.description: Wall Street investment bank JPMorgan Chase stated that Bitcoin treasury company Strategy has recently underperformed in the market. The recent market downturn has led to increasing concerns that index provider MSCI may remove the company from its key stock indices on January 15, 2026. Analysts believe that if MSCI removes Strategy, it could further impact the crypto market and exacerbate volatility. Losing its status as a major index constituent would also damage Strategy's reputation and raise questions about its ability to raise funds in the stock and bond markets. (CoinDesk)

data.title: The US unemployment rate was 4.4% in September, below the expected 4.30%.
data.description: The US unemployment rate in September was 4.4%, below the expected 4.30% and the previous reading of 4.30%. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. nonfarm payrolls increased by 119,000 in September, below the expected 50,000.
data.description: U.S. nonfarm payrolls increased by 119,000 in September, below the expected 50,000 and the previous month's figure revised down from 22,000 to -4,000. (Jinshi)

data.title: ETH/USDT, BTC/USDT and SOL/USDT Lead Binance USD-M Perpetual Futures Market in Trading Volume Over the Past 24 Hours
data.description: According to Binance Futures data, over the past 24 hours, the ETH/USDT, BTC/USDT, SOL/USDT, ZEC/USDT and TNSR/USDT trading pairs led the USD-M perpetual futures market in trading volume.ETH/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 3.76, funding rate: 0.0100%.BTC/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 3.43, funding rate: 0.0072%.SOL/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 5.08, funding rate: 0.0100%.ZEC/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 0.45, funding rate: -0.0298%.TNSR/USDT perpetual futures long/short ratio: 0.38, funding rate: -0.2797%.

data.title: Gate announced that it is opening a refund channel for users of the BOB Web3 Launchpad project.
data.description: According to official sources, due to uncontrollable factors such as market conditions and external token distribution, the opening performance of the BOB token did not meet expectations. To protect the rights and interests of Launchpad participants, Gate has announced the initiation of a voluntary refund process. Users wishing to apply for a refund can deposit their acquired BOB tokens into their Gate spot account and fill out the official refund application form, specifying the number of tokens requested for refund. The platform will then process the refund after review. Gate emphasizes that user interests are always the platform's top priority and will provide a 100% refund channel for all users participating in this project, with all related costs borne by the platform.

data.title: Binance Alpha will list ULTILAND (ARTX) on November 21st.
data.description: Binance Alpha will list ULTILAND (ARTX) on November 21st. Eligible users can claim airdrops using Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha event page after trading opens on Alpha. Further details will be announced later.

data.title: Ahead of the non-farm payrolls report, the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut by the Federal Reserve in December was 29.8%.
data.description: According to CME's "FedWatch": the probability of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates by 25 basis points in December is 29.8%, and the probability of keeping rates unchanged is 70.2%. The probability of the Fed cutting rates by a cumulative 25 basis points by January next year is 49.5%, the probability of keeping rates unchanged is 36.0%, and the probability of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut is 14.5%. (Jinshi)

data.title: CMC Altcoin Season Index Stands at 27
data.description: According to CoinMarketCap (CMC) data, the CMC Altcoin Season Index currently stands at 27. The index measures market performance by analyzing the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization to determine whether the market is shifting towards altcoins or Bitcoin dominance.

data.title: Sequence Aims to Take the Complexity Out of Crypto Payments With Trails
data.description:
Infrastructure firm Sequence seeks to solve crypto's fragmentation problem with Trails, a platform to simplify payments across chains.
source: https://decrypt.co/349283/sequence-aims-take-complexity-out-crypto-payments-trailers

data.title: WhatsApp worm spreads trojan targeting Brazilian crypto apps, financial credentials
data.description:
A new WhatsApp-propagating worm is infecting devices in Brazil, delivering a banking trojan called Eternidade (Portuguese for Eternity) Stealer that steals credentials for cryptocurrency wallets and financial services. According to the findings of Web3 security firm Trustwave SpiderLabs researchers Nathaniel Morales, John Basmayor and Nikita Kazymirskyi, the operation uses Internet Message Access Protocol to fetch […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/whatsapp-spread-trojan-brazil-crypto-apps/

data.title: Polymarket plans to raise new funding at a valuation of $12 billion.
data.description: According to market sources, Polymarket plans to raise a new round of funding at a valuation of $12 billion, higher than the previously disclosed valuation of $10 billion.

data.title: HelloTrade, a blockchain-based US stock trading platform, has raised $4.6 million in funding, led by Dragonfly Capital.
data.description: HelloTrade, a blockchain-based US stock trading platform, announced the completion of a $4.6 million funding round led by Dragonfly Capital, with participation from Mirana Ventures and a group of angel investors. The company, which primarily competes with Robinhood and Revolut, plans to use the new funds to build a blockchain-based trading platform that allows global investors to invest in US stocks and assets. (Fortune)

data.title: Oracle’s AI cloud ambitions hit reality wall as debt climbs past $100 billion, stock market turns on Larry El
data.description:
Oracle is facing its largest reversal in all the four decades of being publicly traded as investors pull back from the company’s massive AI infrastructure push after weeks of falling confidence and a brutal wipeout of gains. The company’s stock, which jumped more than 30% in September after Oracle disclosed a $317 billion revenue backlog, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/oracles-ai-cloud-ambitions-hit-reality-wall/

data.title: Analyst: ETH whales continue to accumulate, $2800 may be a key support level.
data.description: CryptoQuant analyst MAC.D wrote, "Due to uncertainty ahead of Nvidia's earnings report, the US stock market declined, dragging down the crypto market in tandem, with Ethereum briefly falling to $2,870. However, Nvidia's earnings report exceeded expectations, and both the US stock market and crypto assets subsequently rebounded quickly. On-chain data shows that the $2,800 area highly overlaps with the realized price cluster of retail investors and whales, potentially becoming a significant support level. Retail investors are selling, while whales (holding over 10,000 ETH) are continuously accumulating, indicating that supply is concentrating towards long-term large holders. Long liquidation is decreasing, while short positions are increasing; a slight rebound could trigger a short squeeze."

data.title: Aster: S4 is scheduled to launch on December 10th, with 60-90% of fee revenue to be used for token buybacks.
data.description: Perpetual contract DEX Aster announced on the X platform that the S3 token buyback has been completed, with a total of 55,720,650 ASTER tokens repurchased this quarter, bringing the total buyback amount to 155,720,656 tokens to date. S4 is scheduled to launch on December 10th, and 60-90% of the fee revenue from this quarter will be used for token buybacks. The dedicated wallet address for the S4 buyback will be announced separately.

data.title: Binance to Launch Alpha Token Promotion with Reward Pool
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, a new promotion for Alpha Token deposits and transfers to Alpha 2.0 is set to commence. Eligible users will have the opportunity to share in a multi-Alpha Token reward pool by completing specific deposit and transfer tasks during the designated Promotion Period. This period is scheduled from 2025-11-20 12:30 (UTC) to 2025-11-27 12:30 (UTC), with rewards distributed on a first-come, first-served basis.

To participate, users must deposit eligible tokens from an external on-chain address to their Binance Wallet (Keyless) and subsequently transfer these tokens to their Alpha 2.0 Account. The eligible tokens include PLAYSOLANA and PLANCK, with specific amounts required for deposit and transfer to qualify for rewards. The promotion is limited to the first 500 users who complete these tasks, with a total prize pool of 585,000 PLAYSOLANA and 40,000 PLANCK available.

Eligibility for participation is restricted to verified regular users on Binance Alpha, subject to regional product and deposit availability. Certain users, such as liquidity providers in the Binance Spot Liquidity Provider Program and Binance Brokers, are excluded from this promotion. Rewards will be distributed directly to the winning users’ Alpha 2.0 Accounts by 2025-12-05. It is important to note that rewards are not negotiable or transferable and are subject to market fluctuations.

Binance reserves the right to disqualify participants who engage in fraudulent or abusive activities. The promotion's terms and conditions are subject to change at Binance's discretion, including potential amendments to eligibility criteria and reward distribution. Users are advised to ensure compliance with all applicable terms and conditions and to be aware of any regional restrictions that may apply.
